description: Inspect extracted Codex pet frames before atlas composition: per-frame geometry (192x208), non-transparent area, bbox, cell-edge bleed, chroma-adjacent pixels, extraction method, and small/large outliers. Read-only QA.
rules: read-only — reads frame dirs, writes only a JSON report
checks all 9 expected rows; a frames-root missing rows reports errors but still writes the report
report written to record_store as frames-inspection.json
usage: Set FRAMES_ROOT (the dir of per-state frame folders, e.g. extract-frames output). Output: frames-inspection.json (ok, errors, warnings, per-row frame stats).
limitation: Read-only QA; does not modify frames. The core exits non-zero when it finds issues, but the porter still records the report (exit 0). Requires Pillow (PIL).
